title: The Corners
description: Explore the corners of the universe, where no man was meant to.
body:
Ever dreamt a place you've never been?

The Corners adds many unique dimensions based off of Liminal Spaces; Areas in your mind that should have people, but don't. Places that reek of loss, rooms that convey nothing but despair, and so much more. Explore The Corners of the universe, where no man was ever meant to go.

To get to each new dimension, place down a painting that the mod adds, and light it with a Flint and Steel. From there, its activated, and you can walk through whenever you please!

Contact

To get in contact with me or any of the development team, you can join our Discord Server! You can suggest new dimension ideas, chat about random things, or give some neat mod ideas! We're welcome to everyone!

Shaders and Rendering Mods

This mod does in fact work with Iris and Sodium! Though, support for Optifine/Optifabric, Canvas, and other rendering mods is unlikely.

Dependencies

This is a Quilt mod! You need Quilt. Read more here!

There are a few mods that are required for the game to run. You will need QSL.

Soundtracks

Yes! This mod adds numerous soundtracks to the game! Each dimension has its own ambient music and Radio music! Composed by LudoCrypt and Racoon Syndrome, The Corners adds a wide variety of atmospheric music! The music is non-copyright, and you are free to use them anywhere you please, so long as you give appropriate credit!

The Corners Volume Alpha

The Corners Volume Beta

The Corners Volume Delta

List of Dimensions

The dimensions that this mod adds can all be found in the images tab of the mod page!

Credits

Thank you to everyone who contributed to the making of The Corners!

Shai, an incredible artist, created the dimension designs and layouts!

KraCactus, for helping build and design some of the dimensions!

Racoon Syndrome, an incredible musician, created some of the soundtracks you hear ingame!

LudoCrypt, an incredible developer, created the mod you're seeing!

A big hearty thank you to Basement Spider, for creating the Radio textures!

A huge thank you to ImXR24 for creating the Gaia Woodset textures!

FAQ

Will you port to forge/fabric?

Forge and Fabric will not be supported

Will you update to x.x.x version?

No I will not

Can you add this Liminal Space next?

I would love to! Join my Discord Server to suggest it! No guarantee though, but you're always welcome to join in on any of the Corners related activities we have!

How do I access the dimensions?

To get to the new dimensions, you have to place down one of the paintings this mod adds, light it with a Flint and Steel, and walk through. Keep in mind that three of these paintings lead you back to the overworld, this is intentional.

Is there a way to turn off the strong effects the dimensions have?

Yes there is! In the config, you can disable strong shaders. I would not want anyone to have any seizures while playing this mod.

Is this related to the backrooms?

Not directly. This mod is related to Liminal Spaces, which the backrooms is apart of, but the mod as a whole takes inspiration from the concept of Liminal Spaces, not the backrooms itself!
